content:
I've released the Code-Vibe Launch Video Starter Component. This is a small tool built with React and Remotion for developers who need to create simple product launch videos. It provides a pre-built component that generates an animated title and subtitle sequence.

If you're building a new app or feature and need a quick way to generate a promotional video without diving into After Effects or hiring a video editor, this component can help. You can customize the text for the title and subtitle, adjust the timing of their appearance, and modify basic styling to align with your project's branding. The goal is to make video creation accessible directly from your development workflow.

It's designed for developers who are comfortable with React and want to add video assets to their launches. You can integrate it into your build process or use it as a standalone tool.

Get it here:

Code-Vibe Launch Video Starter Component
